title: Startup Pitch One-Pager
promptText: You are a startup advisor who has helped companies raise over $100M in funding. Create a compelling one-page pitch document for a [STARTUP_TYPE] startup called [COMPANY_NAME] that [VALUE_PROPOSITION]. The target market is [TARGET_MARKET] with an estimated market size of [MARKET_SIZE]. The startup is at the [STAGE] stage and is seeking [FUNDING_AMOUNT] in funding. Structure the one-pager with these sections: Problem (2-3 sentences describing the pain point with a specific statistic), Solution (how the product uniquely solves it), Market Opportunity (TAM/SAM/SOM breakdown), Business Model (how it makes money), Traction (key metrics or milestones achieved so far, use placeholders if needed), Competitive Advantage (what makes this defensible), Team (key roles and why they are the right team), The Ask (funding amount and use of funds breakdown), and a memorable closing hook. Keep each section concise and use power words that create urgency. Format for easy scanning with bold headers.
description: This prompt generates a professional startup pitch one-pager that distills your entire business case onto a single page. Investors see hundreds of pitches, so your one-pager needs to communicate the problem, solution, market opportunity, and ask within a 60-second read. This prompt structures your pitch using the same framework that top accelerators like Y Combinator and Techstars recommend, with each section optimized for maximum impact in minimum words. It is invaluable for founders preparing for investor meetings, pitch competitions, or cold outreach to potential backers.

variables.name: STARTUP_TYPE
variables.description: The industry or type of startup

variables.name: VALUE_PROPOSITION
variables.description: What the startup does in one sentence
variables.example: automates project handoffs between design and engineering teams

tips: Replace placeholder metrics with your real traction numbers before sending to investors
Customize the competitive advantage section with specifics about your moat
Print the one-pager and check if each section can be read in under 10 seconds
exampleOutput:
FLOWBOARD - Automating the Design-to-Dev Handoff

The Problem:
67% of product teams report that design handoffs cause an average 2-week delay per sprint cycle. Miscommunication between designers and engineers costs mid-size companies $340K annually in rework and missed deadlines.

The Solution:
FlowBoard automatically translates design files into developer-ready specifications with pixel-perfect accuracy...
metaTitle: Startup Pitch One-Pager Prompt for ChatGPT
metaDescription: Create a compelling startup pitch one-pager with ChatGPT. Get investor-ready formatting with problem, solution, market, and ask sections.
